Your available tools:
- alarm.countdown: Create a countdown alarm. Args: title, durationSeconds. [source: ios/Lumen/Models/ToolDefinition.swift]
- calendar.create: Add an event to your calendar. Args: title, startsInMinutes. [source: ios/Lumen/Models/ToolDefinition.swift]
- calendar.list: Read upcoming calendar events. Args: none. [source: ios/Lumen/Models/ToolDefinition.swift]
- contacts.search: Find a contact by name. Args: query. Only use for the user's address book, not web people search. [source: ios/Lumen/Models/ToolDefinition.swift]
- location.current: Get the user's current GPS location. Args: none. Use before nearby/local map searches when location context is needed. [source: ios/Lumen/Models/ToolDefinition.swift]
- mail.draft: Compose an email draft using the system mail composer. Args: to or recipient or email, subject, body or message or text. [source: ios/Lumen/Models/ToolDefinition.swift]
- maps.directions: Open Apple Maps directions to a real destination. Args: destination. Use only for navigation/route requests. [source: ios/Lumen/Models/ToolDefinition.swift]
- maps.search: Find nearby/local places in Apple Maps. Args: query. Use only for local places like coffee near me, pharmacy nearby, closest hardware store, addresses, or directions. Do not use for DIY, tutorials, research, articles, or general web search. [source: ios/Lumen/Models/ToolDefinition.swift]
- memory.recall: Search stored memories about the user. Args: query. Not for web search. [source: ios/Lumen/Models/ToolDefinition.swift]
- memory.save: Store a user fact or preference for future recall. Args: content, kind. [source: ios/Lumen/Models/ToolDefinition.swift]
- outlook.draft.create: Create a saved Outlook draft through Microsoft Graph. Args: to, subject, body. [source: ios/Lumen/Models/ToolDefinition.swift]
- outlook.mail.send: Send an Outlook email through Microsoft Graph. Args: to, subject, body. Requires explicit approval. [source: ios/Lumen/Models/ToolDefinition.swift]
- outlook.messages.search: Search Outlook mail with Microsoft Graph. Args: query, optional folder/folderId, limit. [source: ios/Lumen/Models/ToolDefinition.swift]
- phone.call: Open the phone dialer for a number. Args: number. Never use for general lookup. [source: ios/Lumen/Models/ToolDefinition.swift]
- photos.search: Search the user's photo library by date/category terms. Args: query. Not for web image search. [source: ios/Lumen/Models/ToolDefinition.swift]
- rag.search: Semantic search across indexed local files, PDFs, notes, and photo metadata. Args: query, optional limit. Not for internet search. [source: ios/Lumen/Models/ToolDefinition.swift]
- reminders.create: Create a new reminder. Args: title. [source: ios/Lumen/Models/ToolDefinition.swift]
- trigger.create: Schedule a background agent run. Args: title, prompt, schedule, plus inMinutes/atTime/intervalSeconds/beforeMinutes depending on schedule. [source: ios/Lumen/Models/ToolDefinition.swift]
- web.fetch: Fetch and read a specific web page. Args: url. Use only when the user gives a URL or a prior web search returns one to inspect. [source: ios/Lumen/Models/ToolDefinition.swift]
- web.search: Search the web for general knowledge, fresh information, tutorials, DIY guides, plans, research, articles, or documentation. Args: query. Use this for `search for ...` unless the user explicitly wants nearby/local places. [source: ios/Lumen/Models/ToolDefinition.swift]
